description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 50 mins. His WakaTime breakdown was 49% Java, 18% Markdown, and 32% Other across 5 projects. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded in the data.
